summary: Harsh recording with vocals overpowering the mix, offering little indication of show quality
review: The sole review criticizes this tape for sounding harsh and having vocals that drown out the instruments, making it difficult to EQ. No positive remarks about the performance are given, suggesting a generally disappointing listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review (2) focusing on poor recording quality; no information on musical performance to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Harsh sound, vocals overly forward, difficult to EQ

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on performance or set structure
